prompt: Luxury futuristic cosmetic product advertisement poster on a deep midnight-blue background, centered composition, featuring a glowing white spray bottle standing upright on a three-tier transparent crystal pedestal with water droplets and glossy reflections. The bottle is tall, cylindrical, minimalist, and softly backlit with a radiant halo, with visible condensation beads across the surface and an exposed pump top. Behind it, a symmetrical luminous lotus made of exactly 10 translucent petals fans out like a digital aura, each petal shimmering with iridescent blue-violet highlights, delicate circuit-like filaments, and tiny sparkling light nodes, blending botanical elegance with data-network aesthetics. The pedestal looks like stacked glass or ice blocks, wet and reflective, sitting on a slick sparkling surface with scattered blue light particles. At the top, elegant serif typography in large glowing white letters reads {argument name="headline text" default="THE PURITY PROTOCOL"}, with a thin horizontal divider line and a small star-like flare at the center beneath it. Below that, smaller spaced sans-serif text reads {argument name="subheadline text" default="DATA STREAM PURIFIER // 75ML"}. On the bottle, the main brand name reads {argument name="brand name" default="SECURE-IP"}, and the product name reads {argument name="product label" default="IP ADDRESS CLEANSER"}, followed by smaller copy: "for risk-free connections" and "pour des connexions sans risque", and at the bottom "75 mL / 2.5 fl. oz. - Data Stream Purifier". Make the overall style ultra-polished, premium, surreal, tech-luxury beauty campaign, with cinematic glow, crisp legible text, high detail, cool blue-white palette, ethereal sparkles, and a sleek balance between skincare advertising and cyber-security metaphor.
translatedPrompt: 深邃午夜蓝背景下的奢华未来感化妆品广告海报，采用居中构图，展示了一款发光的白色喷雾瓶，直立在三层透明水晶底座上，伴有水滴和光泽反射。瓶身修长、圆柱形、极简主义，带有柔和的背光光晕，表面可见凝结的水珠，泵头清晰可见。瓶身背后，一朵由 10 片半透明花瓣组成的对称发光莲花像数字光环般展开，每片花瓣闪烁着虹彩蓝紫色的高光，带有精致的电路状细丝和微小的闪烁光点，将植物的优雅与数据网络美学融为一体。底座看起来像堆叠的玻璃或冰块，湿润且具有反射感，放置在散落着蓝色光粒的光滑闪烁表面上。顶部采用优雅的衬线字体，以醒目的白色发光大字显示 {argument name="headline text" default="THE PURITY PROTOCOL"}，下方有一条细水平分割线，中心处有一个类似星形的光斑。下方较小的无衬线间距文本显示 {argument name="subheadline text" default="DATA STREAM PURIFIER // 75ML"}。瓶身上，主品牌名称为 {argument name="brand name" default="SECURE-IP"}，产品名称为 {argument name="product label" default="IP ADDRESS CLEANSER"}，随后是较小的文案：“for risk-free connections” 和 “pour des connexions sans risque”，底部标注 “75 mL / 2.5 fl. oz. - Data Stream Purifier”。整体风格追求极致精致、高端、超现实、科技奢华美妆大片质感，具备电影级光效、清晰易读的文字、高细节度、冷蓝白色调、空灵的闪光，并在护肤品广告与网络安全隐喻之间达到完美的平衡。

breakdown.creativeCore: 未来科技美妆产品海报：此提示词可生成一张高端科幻美妆风格的广告海报，适用于网络主题喷雾瓶产品，是品牌样机、营销视觉图或概念广告的理想选择。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, minimalist, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
